sections.paragraph:
verb לשלוט

to rule, control; master

verb להישלט

be ruled, controlled; mastered

verb לשלט

to provide signage

verb שולט

to have a signpost installed

verb להשתלט

to take control of

verb להשליט

to introduce, impose (order)

verb הושלט

be introduced (order)

verb לשלט (>>שילט)

to fix signposts

masculine noun

sign, signpost, signboard

masculine noun

remote control, small device used to control an electrical device from a distance; control from far away, activity which can be performed with a remote control while being far from the device
